channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: What to know about the fatal shooting of a Houston man by an ICE officer
item.description: An Immigration and Customs Enforcement officer shot and killed Lorenzo Salgado Araujo in Houston as he drove his construction crew to a job.

item.title: Second person in 4 days is fatally shot in Memphis by federal task force member
Suspect in Charlie Kirk killing said ‘he wishes he hadn’t done it,’ roommate says in police video
